title: [0v3r] Hajime no Ippo v001-141 (ongoing) + Artbook
description:
**I've compiled the chapters into volumes, added covers and left 1 credit page per volume. Enjoy.**

Note: If you downloaded my previous torrents, you'll only have to download volumes 139-141.

Note 2: I deleted the torrent I've uploaded a few minutes ago, I forgot to add the artbook.
___
_Makunochi Ippo is an ordinary high school student in Japan. Since he spends most of his time away from school helping his mother run the family business, he doesn't get to enjoy his younger years like most teenagers. Always a target for bullying at school, Ippo's life is one of hardship. One of these after-school bullying sessions turns Ippo's life around for the better, as he is saved by a boxer named Takamura. He decides to follow in Takamura's footsteps and train to become a boxer, giving his life direction and purpose. Ippo's path to perfecting his pugilistic prowess is just beginning._

_Note: Won the 15th Kodansha Manga Award for Best Shounen Manga in 1991._

description:

___
_The high school boy Eiyuu has a problem! His two childhood friends (♀) who go to the same school as him, Shio and Akari, are too cute! Even though they have no interest in him, he looks at their grown-up selves with sexual interest. If they were to find out… it would be utterly embarrassing! Meanwhile, his two childhood friends also have secrets of their own...!? It's irritating! It's complicated!! But childhood friends are the best!!! A sweet and irritating love triangle romcom ♡ where you can't be honest!_

title: Ashfall.2019.VOSTFR.{EN.SUBS}.DTS.1080p.BluRay.x264-UTT
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/LxqFB0c/MV5-BZDUy-MTQ0-ZWYt-NTE4-My00-YWI1-LWIx-OGEt-NGM5-MTY5-Njhi-OTAy-Xk-Ey-Xk-Fqc-Gde-QXVy-Nz-I1-Nz-Mx-N.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# ASHFALL




***






___

Ashfall (ou Destruction finale en français) commence par une éruption soudaine du mont Paektu, un volcan situé à la frontière entre la Corée du Nord et la Chine. 
Cette éruption provoque des tremblements de terre dévastateurs à travers la péninsule coréenne. 
Face à cette catastrophe, des scientifiques et des militaires des deux Corées doivent collaborer pour prévenir de nouvelles explosions encore plus destructrices.

Une représentante du gouvernement, Jeon Yu Gyeong, va à la rencontre du professeur Kang Bong Rae qui étudie la montagne Baekdu et alerte depuis trois ans déjà des possibles éruptions sans jamais être écouté. 
Une mission du nom de EOD (Explosive Ordnance Disposal) est alors mise en place avec à sa tête Jo In Chang pour se rendre en Corée du Nord et maîtriser les évènements.

.
.


Ashfall est un bon film catastrophe mâtiné de buddy movie. Ashfalls est un titre beaucoup plus juste car une bonne partie du film se passe sous les cendres du volcan Baekdu. 
Les personnages sont sympathiques, plein de doutes.
Le volcan a cheval entre les frontières nord coréenne et chinoise rend les enjeux géopolitiques survoltés, il ne faut pas non plus oublier les ingérences américaines qui pimente la situation déjà explosives.
Un vrai film catastrophe sans émotion ne serait pas un vrai film catastrophe. Nos deux héros ont chacun une famille, une femme, des enfants à sauver. 
Donc, tous les ingrédients sont réunis pour rajouter une bonne dose de suspens en plus avec ce compte à rebours qui s'égrène.

title: [Aoi-Project] Sousou no Frieren - Saison 1 VOSTFR/FRENCH-VF [BD 1080p x265] + Spéciaux
description:
[![Aoi-Project](https://i.imgur.com/y3Zk0cp.png)](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=%22%5BAoi-Project%5D%22)

## [![Nautiljon](https://i.imgur.com/GbhgvaV.jpeg) Sousou no Frieren](https://www.nautiljon.com/animes/sousou+no+frieren.html)
---

| Synopsis       |
|:-------------|
>Que deviennent les héros une fois le mal vaincu ?
>
>Le jeune héros Himmel et ses compagnons, l'elfe Frieren, le nain Eisen et le prêtre Heiter, rentrent victorieux de leur combat contre le roi des démons. Au bout de dix années d'efforts, ils ont ramené la paix dans le royaume. Il est temps pour eux de retrouver une vie normale... Difficile à imaginer après tant d'aventures en commun !
>
>Frieren, elle, ne semble guère touchée par la séparation. Pour la magicienne à la longévité exceptionnelle, une décennie ne pèse pas lourd. Elle reprend la route en solo et promet de retrouver ses camarades un demi-siècle plus tard. Elle tient parole... mais ces retrouvailles sont aussi les derniers instants passés avec Himmel, devenu un vieillard qui s'éteint paisiblement sous ses yeux. Frieren est sous le choc... La vie des humains est si courte ! L'elfe a beau être experte en magie, il lui reste encore un long chemin à parcourir pour comprendre la race humaine... Son nouvel objectif : s'initier aux arcanes du cœur !

![Prez][prez] 

[prez]: https://i.imgur.com/plcyCS1.png

| **Spéciaux** | [Beatrice-Raws](https://nyaa.si/view/1853366) |![Japonais](https://img.streetprez.com/flag/jp_JP.png) Dolby TrueHD (VO) | ![Français](https://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png) [Team Arcedo](https://ddl.team-arcedo.fr/files/%5BMKV%5D%20Animes/Sousou%20no%20Frieren%20-%20Marumaru%20no%20Mahou/)|  | [Team Arcedo](https://ddl.team-arcedo.fr/files/%5BMKV%5D%20Animes/Sousou%20no%20Frieren%20-%20Marumaru%20no%20Mahou/) / Aoi-Project |

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

***

**Isekai Shikkaku | 異世界失格 | No Longer Allowed In Another World | Дисквалифицирован по жизни [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** комедия, фэнтези
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 04 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 09.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия студия [Atelier Pontdarc](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=863)
**Снято по манге:** [Дисквалифицирован по жизни](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=4834)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Дубляжная](https://vk.com/dublyajnaya)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Классик японской литературы Осаму Дадзай должен был умереть после самоубийства в 1948 году. Но в последнюю минуту ему помешал Грузовик-кун, удар которого зашвырнул писателя в фэнтезийный мир, где, как водится, полно невероятных приключений, крутых способностей и милых фэнтезийных девочек. Вот только ему всего этого не надо. Меланхоличный литератор всё так же лелеет свою поэтическую мечту найти идеальное место для смерти. Но как бы он ни рисковал и в какие бы опасности ни влезал, всё всегда оборачивается в его пользу, к его полнейшему разочарованию.

title: [AniSuki] Mato Seihei no Slave (Chained Soldier) (BD) (1080p AV1 10bit)
description:
![alt text](https://a.l3n.co/i/S3BGu9.png)
**Synopsis**
As his school days draw to an end, Yuuki Wakura worries about his future. While lamenting the prospect of living an ordinary life, he is suddenly drawn into the world of Mato: an alternate dimension filled with dangerous monsters called Shuuki. Over the years since the existence of Mato was first confirmed, incidents of people accidentally wandering into the other world have become commonplace. To combat the threat of the Shuuki and rescue victims like Yuuki, the all-female Demon Defense Force was established. Its members have been blessed with the power of "Peaches"—Mato fruits that grant supernatural abilities only to women.

Though Yuuki's situation is dire, he is saved in the nick of time by Kyouka Uzen, the chief of the Demon Defense Force's seventh unit. Despite Kyouka's impeccable skills in battle, she has long been held back by her Peach-granted ability, Slave. Slave allows Kyouka to put a living being under her control and draw out its strength, but the Shuuki that she had enslaved until now had all proven to be exceedingly weak.

When Yuuki and Kyouka become surrounded by a horde of Shuuki, Kyouka resorts to something she has never tried before: using her ability on a man. To her surprise, Yuuki's slave form is much more powerful than she could have imagined. Believing the young man to be the key to unlocking her true potential, Kyouka invites Yuuki to join the Demon Defense Force—but not as a regular member.

**Source:** 
Video/Audio: [BDMV](https://nyaa.si/view/1853046) provided by Lupin the Nerd

Subtitles: SubsPlus+ (OP and ED remain untranslated)

**Encoding Settings:**
Video -

Episodes 09-12 SVT-AV1 2.2.0 [--crf 25 --preset 6 --enable-cdef 0 --enable-variance-boost 1 --variance-boost-strength 2 --variance-octile 4]

Audio - Opus @128kbps

**Описание:**
Масаки — бывшая участница популярной группы ньютуберов Harikiri Sisters. Всё у неё было прекрасно, пока её не уволили прямо в ходе стрима. Однако всё меняется, когда Масаки встречает Лайв — вампиршу со сверхспособностями, которая становится её напарницей. Вместе они собираются пилить крутейший контент и заполучить миллион подписчиков... Правда, у вампирши тут есть свой гастрономический интерес.

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 31 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** next week's batch will be uploaded on Wednesday to include the Bessatsu Shonen Magazine chapters.

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [Team Arcedo] Head Start at Birth - 03 VOSTFR (Web-Rip ABEMA x264 1080p AAC).mkv - Les premiers pas de Lilia la prodige/0-saiji Start Dash Monogatari
description:
Petit projet saisonnier pour l'été. On ne fera que celui là en hebdomadaire.
Ajout d'une correction par rapport à l'épisode 2 : « Tel est mon objectif, Geed ! » ==> « Mon but, c'est d'être un perso cheaté !», j'ai remarqué que Geed était en fait チート = cheaté, ce qui convient plus au contexte. Piccoma à également utilisé la même chose dans sa traduction pour le manga.

- **Synopsis de l'anime** :
> *Que ce soit pour la magie ou l'administration des terres, la petite Lilia est un génie. Et pour cause ! Cette gameuse dans l'âme s'est réincarnée dans un monde où la magie existe. Or elle dispose des souvenirs de sa vie précédente. Alors qu'elle n'a même pas un an, elle commence à s'entraîner. Que ce soit un RPG ou un jeu de gestion, rien ne lui résiste ! Mais lorsqu'elle est invitée au palais royal pour son anniversaire, elle se rend compte qu'elle a peut-être été transportée dans un jeu de romance !*

title: [DeathKoala] Gurren Lagann Movies [BD][1080p][x265][10 bit][FLAC][7.1 5.1 2.0] (Dual-Audio)
description:
Got tired of no English version of the movies being available and decided to take matters into my own hands.

This is a bit of a hodgepodge, and my first time actually making a torrent, so lets run down what all I crammed in here.

Video: [These](https://nyaa.si/view/1281312) [Releases](https://nyaa.si/view/1281681) by Yūrei.

Audio: Japanese FLAC from the [Commie](https://nyaa.si/view/638485) [Releases](https://nyaa.si/view/638487).
           English FLAC ripped from my own overpriced copy of the movies and retimed to match the video.
           English RAW provided for if you want HDR video so you can add it to [this](https://nyaa.si/view/1723863).

Subs: Commie from the same source as the video, with dialog removed to create Signs & Subs tracks.

Fuck aniplex for this godawful overpriced release. I've included the raw/retimed audio and edited subs as separate downloads in case anyone wants to do their own release with them to save them the trouble.
Let me know if I've bungled some aspect of this.

Peace.

好想告诉你 / Kimi ni Todoke / 君に届け S1 + S2 BDRip

本片画质属于当年无功无过的那一类。我们进行了一系列常规操作以提升观感：IVTC、修补画面边缘、降噪、逆向拉伸重构、去晕轮和描线等等。另外，特典中有一个 SBS 3D 视频，需要支持的播放器以及设备方可观看。
The picture quality of Kimi ni Todoke is average for its time. We performed a series of routine enhancements to improve the viewing experience: IVTC, edge repair, denoising, descaling and reconstruction, de-haloing, line darkening, and more. Additionally, specials include an SBS 3D video, which requires compatible players and devices to view.

title: Queen Millennia (1982) (HDTV 1080p x265 HEVC AAC 1.0)[sxales]
description:
![alt text](https://i.postimg.cc/kg6bWnsz/1000-nen-joou-queen-millennia-976100.jpg "Cover")

>"Queen Millennia" retells the story told in the 42-episode TV series.
>
>The planet La-Metal is drawing nearer to Earth than ever as time goes by. Yukino Yayoi the Millennial Queen, camouflaged as an assistant at the observatory, gets a sudden call from a new Millennial Queen, which turns out to be the announcement of a shift in generations. A dark look shades Yayoi's face because she still has things left to do. Her little sister shows around and tells her that La-Metal is planning to take possession of Earth. About that time, Amamori Hajime loses both his parents by an explosion, which causes him to end up at his uncle's place.
>
>Countless meteorites from La-Metal, now turned into blocks of flame, shower on Earth, driving people to panic. Hajime runs towards the mansion where Yukino resides in order to save her, but there he is ushered to the underground where tens of thousands of refugees are present; the place is a giant shelter built by the Millennial Queen several centuries ago. He is taught that this shelter can escape Earth with people and animals inside, just like the vessel depicted in the Bible. Earthquakes shake the earth and the sky, and Noah's ark finally makes its appearance.
>
>On the other hand, a large army sent from La-Metal attacks furiously. Yukino is perplexed why she has been told nothing about it. Just what might be the true intention of La-Metal? The force of Earth strikes back, and the war reaches its climax... [source anidb](https://anidb.net/anime/764)

From the HD TV broadcast. Single Audio: Japanese (Mono AAC). English subtitles from the Henshin DVD release.

[DDL](https://lnk.snahp.eu/45OcOPFmZjX7n9mJpfQo5DhbJaKMPGqh6LLzc)

I would appreciate any help seeding.

title: Ariel Visual (1989) & Ariel Deluxe (1991) (BD 1080p x265 HEVC FLAC 2.0)[sxales]
description:
![alt text](https://i.postimg.cc/8zmVKvZ6/32953-4785-d5f5358a23dc65b995151778ab1312a7-1200x630.jpg "Cover")

>ITo save the Earth from alien invaders and their giant monsters, Dr. Kishida does what any other red-blooded mad scientist would do: he builds a giant robot - Ariel - the ultimate feminine fighting robot!
>
>Unfortunately, his grand-daughters refuse to pilot it! Apparently, they've got more important things to do than becoming teenage super-heroes. Besides, how are you supposed to study for your college entrance exams while getting beaten-up in battle?
>
>Fortunately for Dr. Kishida, things aren't too well for the invaders, either. According to their reports, the Earth was the perfect target: lush, peaceful, and relatively defenseless. Theoretically, the planet should've surrendered long ago. Now, the war is at a standstill, the dreaded Accounting Department is warning about the serious cost overruns, and the head of the home office has arrived from Galactic Headquarters to personally oversee operations. Has Headquarters decided to unleash, The Audit - or do they have something even more evil in mind?
>
>The fate of the world rests upon two people: Kishida Aya, one of the doctor's granddaughters, who may have to give up prep school to pilot the mighty (and lovely) Ariel; and a mysterious alien named Saber Starblast, who may have the power to defeat the invaders once and for all... [source anidb](https://anidb.net/anime/2368)

*Capeta* (2005-2006, 52 episodes) 576p DVD-Rip with Extras by EruPii-Raws.

**Video:** 768×576, H.264 10-bit, CRF 16 Animation preset (Extra: CRF 15)
**Audio:**
- 1: AC3, 448 kbps, 2.0ch
- 2: AC3, 448 kbps, 5.1ch

**DDL:** https://erupiiraws.wordpress.com/capeta/
**Source**: My own R2J DVDs

Hey guys. After a year or so, here's another RAW project. This time it's from the 2005 sports series called **Capeta**. I've been searching for the DVDs for a reasonable price, and finally I found one listing a couple weeks ago, so here it is.

Enjoy!

title: [Alinanonymous] Dead Dead Demons Dededede Destruction 03 (1080p) [076C9F79]
description:
Hey, everyone!

I realistically could have gotten this out yesterday, but spent a little more time on Oba. As for the filesize, I apologize. I'm aware 2gb per episode is quite large, but I don't have the skills to make my own encode.

So, why is this taking so long? Well, I'm doing this all by myself and it's my first time doing it. It's fun, but much more tedious than I originally assumed it would be. I still plan to do the whole show, and I think I'm absolutely getting quicker. I'm retranslating each episode from the ground up (I don't really trust Ocean with anything). However, I did find a source for Japanese subs, which should be a huge speed-up!! I can use them for timing instead, and it'll mean I'm not going by ear for translation. 

NOTES:

- Yes, Oba uses netspeak. He learned all of his Japanese from 2chan. I have no idea why Ocean didn't even attempt to translate these nuances. His manga text doesn't use any kanji, and he speaks emojis out loud.

I decided it would be best to translate this as speaking in lowercase, as well as some abbreviations here and there. It's probably not for everyone and maybe a little obnoxious, but it comes off like that to natives as well.

- Someone asked if they could donate to me, but I would rather you spend that money on the manga. Pancha Diaz, the editor, is fantastic at what she does and has worked on almost every Asano series. While you're at it, maybe check out Goodnight Punpun. It's extremely dark and will probably fuck you up, but the English manga is immaculate and I personally consider it one of the greatest manga ever made.

- Feedback is still very appreciated! Thanks to the Some-Stuffs community once again!

- If you want to contact me for any reason, the easiest way to get to me is my Discord account. Username is Alinanonymous.

## What is this?

Another week another deer episode from your friends at </redacted/>!

This week the studio decided to punish us for saying this show was easy to work on. There were over 50 signs to typeset and scenes to filter.

TL-kun got all of the signs translated on his lunch break. Then TS-kun worked his magic and went above and beyond what was called for. Meanwhile ENC-kun had to come to terms with the fact that encoding is not really that important of a job anymore. So he spent most of his time catching up on his mahou shoujo backlog and smoking marijuana with his father. Who has recently retired and decided to become the world's biggest pot head.

This week we have a tweaked TL of the OP which should remain the same going forward. (Yes, it's time to steal more lines from [DeerGod].)
 
TS-senpai went above and beyond with typesetting and editing. There are far more signs in this release than any human should have done in just the few days he had time to work on it. We wanted to TS some more signs but that would have delayed this release by several more days. If you're interested in the few signs that were not typeset you can find a translation for them in the included TL notes.

It seems like we've gotten into a good rhythm now and will continue subbing this for all 12 episodes. For 3 weeks now we've all shown up every week and people have been putting in more effort than expected. (Now that we've said that, a meteor will wipe all of us out next week.)

Which just goes to show when people are having fun and doing things out of passion and love good things tend to happen. We don't talk to each other outside of working together and only have contact through anonymous burner emails and temp. IRC handles. Which is nice. Since there is no obligation to show up if we don't want to. But people keep showing up week after week. If you'd like to help perhaps you'll considering showing up next week too!

With that in mind we plan to go back and do episode 1 and re-do episode 2 at some point. We also plan to do a batch release using BD sources once those come out. For now we highly suggest grabbing [DeerGod]'s release for episodes 1 and 2. Since our first release of episode 2 isn't up to the same standard as we're releasing now. We never expected for this to become a regular thing nor did we expect someone willing to put in so much effort into typesetting to keep showing up week after week.       
 
On a side note, our hearts go out to those of us who can not view the top two-thirds of the screen. That is all. We also suggest Mahou Shoujo meditation as a form of self-improvement if you truly wish to become 2D. 

## Translation notes:

Within the .mkv file are some TL notes. We've also included Japanese Closed Captions for those that are learning Japanese. Thanks to SweetSub for dumping them and the anon that edited them to fix a few errors.

## Sources used:

- Video: varyg1001 CR WEBRip (H264 High@L4, 1920x1080 @ 7934 kbps, 23.976 (24000/1001) FPS)
- Audio: varyg1001 Amazon WEBRip (Japanese, E-AC3 @ 224 kbps (stereo))
- Main Subtitles: Original English translation by anon(s) (aka DeerStalker)
- Extra Subtitles: English (DeerStalker) SRT | CR Translation in English, ASS │ German, ASS │ Spanish (Latin American), ASS │ French, ASS │ Portuguese (Brazilian), ASS | Chinese, ASS
- Japanese closed captions: SweetSub with minor edits by anon
- Chapters: YES, we are not bakas please enjoy our hand crafted IDR-frames

## How to play:

All our releases are designed for playback on set-top devices (e.g. AppleTV, Firesticks, Xbox One) with native .ass rendering support provided you use a good software player. For most devices we suggest KODI with either a third party Plex or Jellyfin plug-in. For AppleTV we HIGHLY suggest Infuse. All our release playback on PC as well of course. We HIGHLY suggest using mpv or recent fork of MPC-HC with proper libass renderer.

Note that if your device can not render .ass subtitles we've included an SRT version of the script. It's the same translation without signs due to the limitations of the SubRip subtitle format. These will work for devices that can't natively render .ass like Roku.

## Deer tips:

Just a short tip this week. Deer love the smell and taste of marijuana and will seek out the plants to eat them much like tomatoes. They really like to eat the buds. They really love the smell.

You can draw deer into a kill zone when you're sitting in a tree stand by smoking pot and letting the smoke whaff out into the surrounding area. It draws them in like flies to shit. You can even smoke tobacco if you use this trick since the smell of pot will overpower the smell of tobacco. Usually, deer would be spooked by the smell of tobacco alone. But their love of cannabis is so strong they'll ignore it if they get a whiff of the sticky icky.

Smoking tobacco and pot while out in the woods is a great tip in general by the way since it keeps mosquitos and other vermin like gnats away. It is certainly much safer than spreading harmful chemicals all over your skin. It also serves as a great fire starting device!

Another very much unsporting tip to draw in deer: If you leave a small engine running e.g. an ATV they will come in from miles away to investigate the noise. Leave your ATV running below your tree stand or just stand next to it and wait. Deer are truly retarded animals and it's amazing that they haven't gone extinct yet. This is why I refer to them as mobile meat freezers.

See you next week!                                                        

## Note:

While we can not respond to comments we do read them and make fixes if reported. You can always download our releases from our usual XDCC bot on Rizon and our MEGA archives.

You may use any part of this release in your own. All we ask is you follow the terms laid out in the Loli-GPL license. A copy of the LGPL license is included inside the .mkv file.

Take care!

- Your friends at [Redacted]

title: [Edo-raws] パーマン - Perman (1967) [1080p]
description:
パーマン (1967年)
Perman (1967)
===============


What is this?
-------------

The manga Perman by Fujiko F. Fujio was first adapted into animation in 1967. This series consists of 54 episodes, with each episode divided into two parts (A and B). It aired from April 2, 1967, to April 14, 1968, on Japanese channel TBS, broadcasting from 7:30 PM to 8:00 PM. The show was produced in black and white.

This torrent contains all surviving episodes in 1080p, though the quality varies. The content is sourced from the Blu-ray set released in 2024, titled "Perman 1967-nenban Blu-ray" (release date: 28/06/2024, code: BFTD-0490).


What does it contain?
---------------------

You'll find episodes 1 to 54, with some exceptions and variations:

Episodes 16A and 47A are not included in the BD-set. However, you can find YouTube rips of these episodes in the `bonus` folder. 16A is available in Spanish dub, while 47A is in Portuguese.

Episodes 04A, 17A, and 39A are in HD but lack sound. Portuguese from Brazil dubs for 04A and 17A are provided in the `bonus` folder. Unfortunately, dubs in other languages or any version of episode 39A are currently unavailable. If you have access to these in different dubs, please let me know.

The masters for episodes 27B, 30B, and 48B have gone missing since the DVD edition. As a result, these episodes were upscaled from SD sources instead of being scanned in HD.

Episode 51B is available in HD with sound, but the video quality is very low. The film is badly damaged, especially at the beginning.

Regarding openings and endings, the BD set contains:

- OP A and B, both with song lyrics
- Rerun OP (similar to OP A, but without the last part featuring Peko-chan)
- ED A and B, both available with and without credits

On the BD set, each half-episode starts with the OP. There is no ED. OP A is used from episode 1 to 13 and 27 to 54, while OP B (which introduces Per-ko and Per-yan) is used from episode 14 to 26.

The breakdown of OP and ED usage is as follows:

- First run: OP includes only lyrics, ED contains staff and cast credits. The OP animation changes at some point.
- Rerun: OP does not include lyrics but contains credits. There is no ED. The OP animation remains consistent.

The last episode features different ED animation and credits.

Additionally, there are two TV commercials for magazines where the Perman manga was published.


Anything else worth mentioning?
-------------------------------

The video was encoded using ffmpeg. You can find the bash script used in the `script` folder. Constructive criticism of the parameters used is welcome.

The audio has been converted to mono.

If you want to run the scripts yourself using a local rip of the discs, you need to set the variables `input_dir` and `output_dir` to point to the source folder (the `STREAM` directory in the `BDMV` package) and where you want the videos to be encoded, respectively. This needs to be done in all three script files.

The episodes have metadata set for the title and airing date. This ensures a great playback experience with VLC and Plex (in both matched and unmatched mode).

Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.
